Class BctDataItemGenerator

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DataItemGenerator
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.BctDataItemGenerator
public class BctDataItemGenerator extends DataItemGenerator
Class in which the individual DataItems of the JSON specification with bct context are generated.

    Constructors

    Description
    BctDataItemGenerator(List<MiiConsent> consents)
    Initialization of the BCT related fhir resource lists.

      public BctDataItemGenerator(List<MiiConsent> consents)
      Initialization of the BCT related fhir resource lists.

  • Method Details

    • getDataItems

      public List<DiseaseDataItem> getDataItems(Map<String,Boolean> mapExcludeDataItems, VariantSettings variantSettings, InputCodeSettings inputCodeSettings, QualitativeLabCodesSettings qualitativeLabCodesSettings, DataItemContext dataItemContext, GlobalConfiguration globalConfiguration)
      Creation of the JSON specification file for the Corona dashboard based on FHIR resources.
      Overrides:
      getDataItems in class DataItemGenerator
      Parameters:
      mapExcludeDataItems - Map with data items to be excluded from the output (e.g. `acr.current.recruitment`)
      variantSettings - Configuration of extended covid-19 variants for the definition of not yet known/captured variants.
      inputCodeSettings - The configuration of the parameterizable codes such as the observation codes or procedure codes.
      globalConfiguration - An instance of the global configuration settings.
      Returns:
      List with all the data items that are defined in the corona dashboard JSON specification
